brief: Build a task management system with real-time updates and team collaboration features. Focus on simplicity and speed. Shipping V1 features only. V2 and V3 features deferred to next sprint.
primaryFlow: User logs in → creates/edits tasks → sees real-time updates from team → marks complete
dataModel: Tasks: { id, title, description, status, dueDate, assignee, createdAt, updatedAt }
techStack: Frontend: React + TypeScript, Backend: Node.js + Express, DB: PostgreSQL, WebSocket: Socket.io
riskAssessment: WebSocket connections may not scale beyond 100 concurrent users
Database query performance needs optimization for large task lists
Real-time sync conflicts need careful handling for concurrent edits
